description:
## Goal

Replace ad hoc Tauri-side stderr reporting with the official Tauri v2 logging plugin and establish a small, consistent native logging policy.

## Background

`src-tauri/src/rpc.rs` currently uses `eprintln!` when workspace-transition event emission fails. As workspace lifecycle work adds asynchronous failure paths, structured native logs improve diagnosis without requiring console output conventions to spread.

## Required reference

Use the official Tauri v2 logging plugin documentation and setup guidance: https://v2.tauri.app/plugin/logging/.

## Scope

- Add/configure the official plugin following its documented Rust and frontend/capability setup as applicable.
- Replace the transition-event `eprintln!` with the appropriate structured log call.
- Audit nearby native logging only; do not perform a repo-wide unrelated logging rewrite.
- Document chosen targets/levels and log destination behavior where the configuration lives.

## Acceptance criteria

- The app initializes the official plugin correctly in debug and release configurations.
- Failed transition emission is logged with useful context at an appropriate level.
- No user-facing workspace behavior changes.
- Rust checks/tests and relevant desktop launch coverage pass.
title: Adopt Tauri logging plugin
